title: Blood of Aenarion
author: william-king
description: Tyrion and Teclis — twin sons of an elven noble, heirs to the blood of the mightiest warrior-king their race has ever known — are drawn into a web of ancient prophecy, dark sorcery and political intrigue. Their destiny will shape the future of the elven people, but first they must survive those who fear what they might become.

title: Sword of Caledor
author: william-king
description: Tyrion and Teclis come into their power as champions of the high elves, but their paths begin to diverge. Tyrion is a warrior without equal, Teclis a mage of devastating ability — together they are a force of nature, but the darkness in their blood grows stronger the more they embrace their gifts.

title: Bane of Malekith
author: william-king
description: The Tyrion and Teclis trilogy reaches its climax as the twins face their greatest trial. Malekith and the forces of Naggaroth close in, and the ancient curse in their blood threatens to consume them utterly. Only by embracing everything they are — light and shadow, warrior and mage — can they hope to prevail.
